name: New Orleans Crab Canape
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup cooked crabmeat (or 6-3/4 ounces canned crab, drained and flaked)
4 ounces grated Swiss or Gruyere cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan. Add onion and cook over moderate heat until soft.
2. Stir in flour, cooking 1 minute; stir in broth, cooking until smooth.
3. Add crabmeat, simmer 8 to 10 minutes. Remove from heat and cool.
4. For the cheese topping: Melt butter, add flour to make a roux, and cook two or three minutes.
5. Stir in cheeses, blending well. Remove from heat and let cool.
6. Form the mixture into small, firm, round balls.
7. Cut bread into canape-sized pieces. Sauté in butter until lightly browned.
8. Spread each piece with crab mixture, then place a cheese ball on top.
9. Just before serving, return to oven for 5 minutes or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Makes about 50 servings.
